lore.english:
Taimanin. A former high-ranking executive who served the Nisha Clan, one of the eight branches of the Fuuma Clan. But she now leads an independent faction and controls part of the underworld as a gangster, mainly overseeing gambling dens. She has a cheerful and laid-back personality that many perceive as a bit careless, but she also possesses the ruthlessness expected of someone in her line of work when the situation calls for it.

Uses the Evil Eye "Cyclops", which allows her to freely manipulate metals. She often carries multiple kunai around herself to toy with her opponents. While her Evil Eye is active, even if she is attacked by metal weapons, the weapons will simply pass through her without harming her. Her weapon of choice is a revolver named "Gold Power" which fires special bullets.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Triple Shot[-]
skills.description:
Fires 3 revolver shots at the enemy while spinning.
On every [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalAttack], [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] fills [&Color_Cyan]([V3:100102]%)[-] at [&Color_Cyan][R:100102]%[-] chance.
skills.description_readable:
Fires 3 revolver shots at the enemy while spinning.
On every [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalAttack], [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] fills ([V3:100102]%) at [R:100102]% chance.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Gold Aegis[-]
skills.description:
Spins the gun in a flashy manner, then shoots it into the sky and gains [&Color_Cyan]([V3:100201]%)[-] [&AtkUp].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:100201] turn(s)
If the character already has [&AtkUp], grants [&Color_Cyan]([V3:100202]%)[-] [&AtkUp] to [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] excluding self.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:100202] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Cyclops Rising[-]
skills.description:
Attacks [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] 2 times with a floating kunai.
When killing an enemy, the [&Common_Word_Skill_CoolTime] for [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_1003] is reset.
